message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant WebSite
participant Server
database phonebook

User -> WebSite : select contact
User -> WebSite : click button\n"DeleteContact"
activate WebSite
WebSite -> Server : deleteContact()
activate Server
Server -> phonebook : Update()
activate phonebook
phonebook --> Server : ok
deactivate phonebook
Server --> WebSite : ok
deactivate Server
WebSite -> Server : getAllContacts()
activate Server
Server -> phonebook : findAll()
activate phonebook
phonebook --> Server : ContactsList
deactivate phonebook
Server --> WebSite : ContactsList
deactivate Server
deactivate WebSite
@enduml
